description: Unified travel search — flights via Google Flights, hotels via Booking.com, homes via Airbnb, plus user's existing bookings. Powered by the travel-mcp platform connector.

role.name: Travel Agent
role.persona:
You are a travel assistant. You help find and compare flights, hotels and home rentals.

Tools:
- travel.searchFlights(origin, destination, depart_date, return_date?) — Google Flights, no auth.
- travel.searchHotels(location, checkin_date, checkout_date, guests?) — Booking.com, no auth.
- travel.searchHomes(location, checkin_date, checkout_date, guests?) — Airbnb, no auth.
- travel.myBookings() — user's bookings on Booking.com. REQUIRES auth.
- travel.planTrip(origin, destination, depart_date, return_date, ...) — one-shot trip planner; runs flights+hotels in parallel and returns combined view with cheapest total. Use when user wants to PLAN a trip vs. just search flights/hotels.

Auth (only for myBookings):
- platform.auth.status({service_id:'booking'}) — silent check.
- platform.auth.ensureConnected({service_id:'booking'}) — opens native sign-in webview.

Rules:
- Public searches need NO auth — call the tool directly.
- For travel.myBookings, FIRST call platform.auth.status. If connected=false, call ensureConnected, then travel.myBookings.
- Convert relative dates ("next week", "in june") to absolute YYYY-MM-DD using today's date.
- Mobile chat — replies 1-2 sentences. Plain text. Format prices with currency ($, €, etc).
- Never book anything. Search only.
- If request isn't travel-related, sys.handoffToSkill({to_skill:'auto-orchestrator'}).

Good reply: "3 flights TLV→JFK on Jun 15: $850 United 1-stop, $920 Delta direct, $780 El Al direct."
Bad reply: "Here are flights I found:\n- Option 1\n- Option 2"

--- IMPORTANT DATE HANDLING ---
- If user doesn't give a date, ASK "When are you traveling?" — never assume.
- If they give a relative date ("next week", "in june"), compute from TODAY (the current calendar date). NEVER use a date in the past.
- If unsure of today's date, call device.calendar.today (via auto-orchestrator) or use a clearly-future date like one month out.

--- NEVER FABRICATE ---
- ONLY report flights/hotels that travel.search* actually returned.
- If the tool returns count=0 or empty, say "No results found for those dates" and ASK the user for different dates. DO NOT invent route info, airline names, connection cities, or commentary about "typical" routes.
- Every airline, price, connection city, duration MUST come from the tool result.

--- CONTEXT RETENTION ---
- On follow-up messages ("check for non direct", "cheaper", "earlier"), REUSE the prior query's origin/destination/dates from the conversation. Don't re-ask details you already have.

supported.description: Get a briefing of today's schedule, weather, and important information.
examples: How's my day looking?
What's on my schedule today?
Give me the rundown for today
What should I know about today?
examples_generated: How's my day looking?
What's on my schedule today?
Give me the rundown for today
What should I know about today?

supported.description: Create, modify, or check calendar events and appointments.
examples: Schedule a dentist appointment for next week
When is my meeting with Sarah?
Move my 3pm call to tomorrow
Block out time for lunch on Friday
examples_generated: Schedule a dentist appointment for next week
When is my meeting with Sarah?
Move my 3pm call to tomorrow
Block out time for lunch on Friday

supported.description: Send messages, make calls, or manage contacts.
examples: Text Mom that I'm running late
Send a message to the team about the delay
Call the restaurant to make a reservation
What's John's phone number?
examples_generated: Text Mom that I'm running late
Send a message to the team about the delay
Call the restaurant to make a reservation
What's John's phone number?

supported.description: Get directions, check commute times, and location-based information.
examples: How long to get to the airport?
What's traffic like to downtown?
Find me a coffee shop nearby
Best route to avoid construction?
examples_generated: How long to get to the airport?
What's traffic like to downtown?
Find me a coffee shop nearby
Best route to avoid construction?

supported.description: Look up information, browse websites, and research topics online.
examples: Look up reviews for that new restaurant
Check if my flight is on time
Find articles about the latest iPhone
What's the weather forecast for this weekend?
examples_generated: Look up reviews for that new restaurant
Check if my flight is on time
Find articles about the latest iPhone
What's the weather forecast for this weekend?

tools.name: travel.searchFlights
tools.description: Search Google Flights for flights between two airports/cities on given dates. Returns matching flights with summary, parsed stops, price, and duration_minutes. Server-side filters: max_stops (0=direct), min_stops (1=connecting), max_price, max_duration_hours, airlines, cabin. Server-side sort: price | duration | departure.

origin.description: Origin airport code (e.g. 'TLV') or city name

destination.description: Destination airport code or city name

return_date.description: Return date YYYY-MM-DD. Omit for one-way.

min_stops.description: Min stops required. 1 = exclude direct flights.

max_price.description: Max total price (integer, in displayed currency).

max_duration_hours.description: Max total trip duration in hours.

airlines.description: Limit to flights matching any of these airline names (substring, case-insensitive).

max_results.description: Max results after filtering+sort. Default 5, max 20.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. 'EUR', 'USD', 'GBP', 'ILS'). Inferred from route when omitted.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: travel.searchHotels
tools.description: Search Booking.com for hotels. Returns hotels with parsed price_per_night and rating_num (0-10). Server-side filters: max_price_per_night, min_rating. Sort by 'price' or 'rating'. No auth required for search.

min_rating.description: Min review score on 0-10 scale (e.g. 8.0 for 'very good' or higher).

max_results.description: Max results after filtering+sort. Default 5, max 25.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. 'EUR', 'USD', 'GBP', 'ILS'). Inferred from location when omitted.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: travel.searchHomes
tools.description: Search Airbnb for home/apartment rentals. Returns listings with parsed price_per_night and rating_num (0-10). Server-side filters: max_price_per_night, min_rating. Sort by 'price' or 'rating'. No auth required.

min_rating.description: Min review score on 0-10 scale (Airbnb 5-scale is normalized).

max_results.description: Max results after filtering+sort. Default 5, max 25.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: travel.searchCars
tools.description: Search Kayak for rental cars at a pickup location for given pickup/return dates. Returns cars with parsed price_per_day, price_total, and car_type when detectable. Server-side filters: max_price_per_day, max_price (total), car_type (Economy/SUV/Premium/etc., substring match), suppliers (rental company name list). Sort by 'price' (per-day) or 'total'. No auth required.

pickup_location.description: Pickup city, airport code, or area (e.g. 'Rome', 'LAX', 'Paris')

driver_age.description: Driver age (Kayak adjusts pricing for under 25).

car_type.description: Substring match against detected car_type (Economy, Compact, SUV, Premium, Luxury, Van, etc.)

suppliers.description: Filter to specific rental companies (substring match, case-insensitive). Examples: ['Hertz','Avis','Sixt'].

sort_by.description: Sort by per-day price or total price.

max_results.description: Max results after filtering+sort. Default 5, max 25.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: travel.planTrip
tools.description: One-shot trip planner — searches Google Flights AND Booking.com hotels in parallel for the same dates and returns a combined view with a cheapest-option price estimate. Requires return_date (for the hotel checkout). All filter params from searchFlights and searchHotels are accepted as passthrough. No auth required.

origin.description: Origin airport code or city name

destination.description: Destination — used as the city for hotels too

guests.description: Number of hotel guests. Default = adults.

max_results.description: Max items per category (flights, hotels). Default 3, max 10.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: travel.myBookings
tools.description: Fetch the current user's bookings from Booking.com. Requires the actor to be connected — caller must call platform.auth.ensureConnected({service_id:'booking'}) first if needed.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

_adas_tenant.description: Internal: tenant ID injected by Core

tools.name: auth.listServices
tools.description: Internal — returns the auth services this connector handles, for platform.auth self-registration.

tools.name: memory.store
tools.description: Store a long-term HUMAN/AGENT CONTEXT memory — facts, preferences, taught rules, user profile fields. Content must be concise, durable, and recallable. Types: preference, fact, instruction, pattern, rule, user_model; the engine assigns the CoALA kind automatically (semantic / procedural). DO NOT use for: session cookies, OAuth tokens, API keys, or any credentials (use platform.dataStore). DO NOT use for: raw tool-output dumps, large JSON blobs, or cached API responses (use platform.dataStore). The engine runs quality guards, dedup, normalize, and conflict detection; rejections include a `guidance` field telling you the correct tool/path. Returns { memory, conflicts, processing }.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

content.description: Memory content (natural language or JSON for structured types)

tools.name: memory.recall
tools.description: Recall memories by keyword query. Searches content + raw_content + tags. When embeddings come online this transparently becomes semantic.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.list
tools.description: List stored memories with optional type/kind filter and pagination.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.update
tools.description: Update an existing memory by ID.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.delete
tools.description: Delete a memory by ID.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.rules.match
tools.description: Match active taught rules against a situation. Returns ranked rules. Used by Core fast_path / detectIntent to decide whether to short-circuit.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.rules.count
tools.description: Count active vs inactive taught rules for the current actor.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: context.store
tools.description: Store an ephemeral context (situation or plan). Auto-expires via Mongo TTL index.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: context.read
tools.description: Read active ephemeral context — current situations and plans.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: context.resolve
tools.description: Mark an ephemeral context as resolved or abandoned.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: context.clear
tools.description: Clear all active ephemeral context for the actor (optionally filtered by type).

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.userProfile
tools.description: Get the complete user profile in one call. Returns structured profile, preferences, facts, instructions, and active taught rules. Call at the start of every interaction.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.userProfile.set
tools.description: Set a structured profile field (name, timezone, location, etc). Creates or updates a user_model memory.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.semantic.search
tools.description: Semantic search over memories. Returns matches with similarity scores. Degrades to keyword recall when embeddings provider is not configured (P1).

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.explain
tools.description: Explain why a memory is remembered: returns the memory + its full meta trail.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.summarize
tools.description: Structured snapshot of what's known about the current actor. P1 returns counts + structured profile. LLM narrative summary will be added in P6.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.compact
tools.description: Run a compaction sweep — decay stale auto-learned memories and surface duplicate clusters. Does not auto-merge in P1; returns candidates for review.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.confidence
tools.description: Read or set the confidence score on a memory.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

confidence.description: Omit to read, provide to set

tools.name: memory.supersede
tools.description: Mark old memory as superseded by new memory. Old becomes inactive, link recorded.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.audit
tools.description: Read meta trail for a single memory or recent events for the actor.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

id.description: Memory ID — if omitted, returns recent actor events

tools.name: memory.embed
tools.description: Generate an embedding vector for arbitrary text. Returns null when no embedding provider is configured (P1 default).

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

tools.name: memory.extract
tools.description: Run end-of-job auto-extraction over a transcript. Cheap regex pass always runs; smart LLM pass runs if smart=true and Core LLM is reachable. Writes extracted memories with source='auto' and lower confidence.

_adas_actor.description: Internal: actor ID injected by Core

smart.description: Also run LLM pass (default false in P1)
